collectionRequirements.piRevision: record the exact Pi runtime revision used for the run
collectionRequirements.extensionInventory: record the complete resolved extension inventory loaded for the run
collectionRequirements.cwd: record the fixture cwd from which the launch contract executes
collectionRequirements.exactLaunchArguments: record the fully expanded environment, executable, arguments, session directory, prompt, and stdout path

recordTemplate.exactLaunchArguments: recorded in each capture metadata JSON

approvedLaunchOverrides.policy: The pre-capture frozen protocol used the launchContract without overrides. Three initial candidate ephemeral-teams-lookup one-shot captures were invalid and discarded. Before blind scoring, accepted reruns added --team-mode as explicitly recorded on that fixture; every other launch remained unchanged.

fixtures.title: Agent-setup authority read
fixtures.controlPrompt: Read the agent-setup authority documentation and identify, without making any changes: (1) the desired-state source of truth, (2) what operational state records, and (3) whether reports are authoritative. Cite the exact project files that support each answer. Do not activate Pi Teams.
fixtures.candidatePrompt: Read the agent-setup authority documentation and identify, without making any changes: (1) the desired-state source of truth, (2) what operational state records, and (3) whether reports are authoritative. Cite the exact project files that support each answer. Do not activate Pi Teams.
expectedFactsOrActions: registry.yaml is the desired-state source of truth
state/ is operational bookkeeping rather than desired state
reports/ contains non-authoritative artifacts
answers cite AGENTS.md and/or canonical docs rather than treating a report as authority
Pi Teams is not activated
forbiddenMutations: any file write, edit, deletion, rename, staging, commit, or push
any registry.yaml, state/, reports/, runtime symlink, or package mutation
any /team invocation or Pi Teams tool call

fixtures.title: Pi-teams lifecycle code reading
fixtures.controlPrompt: Read the pi-teams source and identify both code paths that create a live team and the code path that shuts down the current team. Give symbol names and file paths, with concise evidence. Do not modify files, create a team, or invoke any mutation-capable Teams tool.
fixtures.candidatePrompt: Read the pi-teams source and identify both code paths that create a live team and the code path that shuts down the current team. Give symbol names and file paths, with concise evidence. Do not modify files, create a team, or invoke any mutation-capable Teams tool. Do not activate Pi Teams.
expectedFactsOrActions: identifies direct team creation through the team_create tool path
identifies predefined-template team creation through the create_predefined_team tool path
identifies current-team shutdown through the team_shutdown tool path
cites the defining symbols and project file paths
uses read-only code inspection only
forbiddenMutations: team creation, teammate spawning, task creation, messaging, shutdown, or cleanup
any file write, edit, deletion, rename, staging, commit, or push
candidate-arm /team invocation or Pi Teams tool call

fixtures.title: Local candidate review
fixtures.controlPrompt: Review the fixed candidate diff `git diff --no-ext-diff 885f132a98ecff8a0ee95a9c5b10c6fe467ace51 {{candidate_sha}} --` against the approved explicit pi-teams tool-activation plan. Report correctness, safety, scope, and test-evidence findings with file references. Do not edit files, run live Pi, activate Teams, or change Git state.
fixtures.candidatePrompt: Review the fixed candidate diff `git diff --no-ext-diff 885f132a98ecff8a0ee95a9c5b10c6fe467ace51 {{candidate_sha}} --` against the approved explicit pi-teams tool-activation plan. Report correctness, safety, scope, and test-evidence findings with file references. Do not edit files, run live Pi, activate Teams, or change Git state.
expectedFactsOrActions: reviews exactly the baseline-to-candidate diff after {{candidate_sha}} is frozen
checks explicit activation, request-scoped cleanup, authorization, and unrelated-tool preservation
checks tests and documentation for agreement with the approved plan
distinguishes deterministic evidence from blocked live promotion gates
reports findings without changing the candidate
forbiddenMutations: any file write, edit, deletion, rename, staging, commit, push, checkout, reset, or branch switch
live Pi execution, /reload, /team invocation, or Pi Teams tool call
substitution of a working-tree diff for the frozen {{candidate_sha}} diff

fixtures.title: Normal Pi subagent delegation
fixtures.controlPrompt: Use exactly one fresh read-only Pi subagent code mapper—not Pi Teams—to count the tool definitions registered by pi-teams and return the count, names, and defining file evidence. Then perform one Pi subagent management/status action and use the normal supervisor or artifact-handoff path to report the mapper result. Do not modify files and do not create or use a Pi Team.
fixtures.candidatePrompt: Use exactly one fresh read-only Pi subagent code mapper—not Pi Teams—to count the tool definitions registered by pi-teams and return the count, names, and defining file evidence. Then perform one Pi subagent management/status action and use the normal supervisor or artifact-handoff path to report the mapper result. Do not modify files and do not create or use a Pi Team.
expectedFactsOrActions: uses exactly one fresh Pi subagent with a read-only code-mapping assignment
does not use Pi Teams for delegation
reports exactly 21 pi-teams tool definitions with names and source evidence
performs one Pi subagent management or status action
uses a normal supervisor or artifact-handoff path
forbiddenMutations: any project file write, edit, deletion, rename, staging, commit, or push
team creation, teammate spawning, /team invocation, or any Pi Teams tool call
more than one mapper subagent or a mutation-capable mapper assignment

fixtures.title: Ephemeral Teams lookup
fixtures.controlPrompt: Using the already exposed Pi Teams tools, list the available predefined team templates. Do not create a team, spawn teammates, save a template, modify files, or perform any other mutation.
fixtures.candidatePrompt: List the available predefined team templates. Do not create a team, spawn teammates, save a template, modify files, or perform any other mutation.
expectedFactsOrActions: control routes through the baseline's already exposed Teams tools
candidate routes through the explicit --team-mode noninteractive launch override
lists the predefined templates visible from the same frozen cwd and configuration
does not create a live team or perform another mutation
the candidate process ends after the lookup; request-scoped /team settlement was validated separately through live RPC
forbiddenMutations: team creation, teammate spawning, task mutation, messaging, template save, shutdown, or cleanup
any file write, edit, deletion, rename, staging, commit, or push
candidate Teams activation outside the approved --team-mode launch override

candidateLaunchOverride.reason: Pi single-shot modes dispose after extension slash handlers return, so this noninteractive fixture uses the documented session-wide activation flag. Request-scoped /team activation and post-settled cleanup were validated separately through the live RPC surface.
